unit.note: Diff touches ONLY an E2E spec (client/e2e/flows/v0-9-5-task-type-matrix.spec.ts) — no vitest-covered code changed. tsc --noEmit clean (client); oxlint clean on the touched spec.

integration.note: No integration surface — a test-fixture version-constant correction, no route/store/contract/cross-component machinery touched.

e2e.note: F0.5 isolated-stack run (temp USERPROFILE, :3848, 127.0.0.1), config playwright.iterate.config.ts, exit 0. 12 passed (axis A/B/D x 4 task types), 4 conditionally skipped (axis C cursor — the spec's documented test.skip when the replay-only path renders no focus-visible cursor), 0 failed. RED->GREEN proven: reverting the header to v1/5.5.0 makes axis A fail at toContainText(MARKER) (marker never renders); restoring v2/6.0.0 makes envs=[[ready,replay_snapshot]] and all 12 pass.

design_fidelity.note: Test-only change; no visual/UI surface touched.

smoke.note: Isolated single-process stack (built client + SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR + tsx on :3848, temp USERPROFILE, 127.0.0.1, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) booted loopback-only with headless-mirror enabled; served the full 16-test E2E run.

surface_verification.runner: node client/node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test --config client/playwright.iterate.config.ts client/e2e/flows/v0-9-5-task-type-matrix.spec.ts (BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3848, USERPROFILE=<temp>, PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=<real ms-playwright>)

enumeration_basis: The diff changes exactly one thing — the snapshot-envelope version the E2E fixture writer emits (v1/xterm@5.5.0 -> v2/xterm@6.0.0). Its full behavioral surface: (1) the server replay version-gate accepts the header and emits replay_snapshot; (2) the marker renders in the DOM after replay; (3) the single-pty/no-chunked-envelope contract (axis D) holds on the replay-only path. All three proven across the 4 task types. Axis C (cursor) is a pre-existing conditional skip, NOT a behavior this diff introduces. ACs=3, covered_acs=3.

behaviors.behavior: A v2/xterm@6.0.0 snapshot header written by the E2E is accepted by the server replay version-gate (replay-snapshot.ts tryReadSnapshot + snapshot-store.ts SUPPORTED_VERSIONS={v2}) -> replay_snapshot emitted on WS attach for all 4 task types
behaviors.evidence: v0-9-5-task-type-matrix.spec.ts axis A (4 pass): envs=[[ready,replay_snapshot],[ready,replay_snapshot]]. RED proof: v1/5.5.0 header emits NO replay_snapshot and axis A fails at toContainText(MARKER).

behaviors.behavior: The snapshot marker renders in .xterm-rows under the forced DOM renderer after replay, and pre-leave rows are a subset of post-return rows (rendering correctness)
behaviors.evidence: v0-9-5-task-type-matrix.spec.ts axis A + axis B (8 pass across 4 task types).

behaviors.behavior: Replay-only path (done state) yields replayOnly:true, exactly one replay_snapshot per attach, ZERO chunked-replay envelopes, no pty spawned, and state stays done across N navigate-away/back cycles
behaviors.evidence: v0-9-5-task-type-matrix.spec.ts axis D (4 pass across 4 task types).
